title: Too Much XP (TME)
description: Yeets the laggy XP orbs, whilst still maintaining a high level count
body:
![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/2J3CBN4p?label=Downloads)\
Ever noticed significant lag from experience?\
Want to get rid of it but don't know how?\
Do you know how but then stop because you can't enchant?\
Then TME is for you!


TME (Too much XP/experience) is a simple data pack that completely yeets the experience orbs, improving performance significantly, whilst keeping your level bar on a high amount so you can still enchant.\
Mob farms will now be a lot less laggy, so this is useful for materials on survival, and creative, if you like torturing mobs.

I hope you enjoy!
